data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: WhatsApp employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and robustness.
data.technical_spec: Individual services for messaging, data processing, and user management.

data.title: End-to-End Encrypted Channels
data.description: All messages and calls are end-to-end encrypted to ensure privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: Encryption based on the Signal Protocol.

data.title: Global Distribution
data.description: Data centers distributed globally for fast accessibility and redundancy.
data.technical_spec: Content Delivery Network (CDN) and localized data hubs.

data.title: Asynchronous Data Processing
data.description: Non-blocking operations to manage user data and system tasks efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Use of message queues and task schedulers.

data.title: Multi-Platform Integration
data.description: Supports seamless operation across multiple devices and operating systems.
data.technical_spec: APIs and SDKs for iOS, Android, and web clients.
